Join our startup as a product engineer who ships fast and takes full ownership.

We need a generalist who can handle frontend, some backend work, and tooling. You will work cross-functional with design, product, and data teams. Product mindset and end-to-end ownership are essential.

Startup environment, early stage, lean team (series B). We move fast and value self-starters.

Requirements:
- React, TypeScript (frontend-first but full-stack awareness needed)
- Some Node.js or backend API experience
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills
- Self-directed, proactive, adaptable

Full-time position, hybrid.
